antigravity.name: Antigravity
antigravity.description: A general-purpose managed agent that autonomously plans, reasons, runs code, manages files, and browses the web inside a secure, isolated Linux sandbox.
antigravity.bestUseCase: Autonomous agent development, complex multi-step tasks, code execution, web browsing automation, file management

pricing.note: Preview pricing - check official docs for current rates

gemini-3.5-flash.name: Gemini 3.5 Flash
gemini-3.5-flash.description: Most intelligent model for sustained frontier performance. Fast, balanced performance with multimodal capabilities.
gemini-3.5-flash.bestUseCase: General-purpose tasks, multimodal content processing, balanced speed and quality, production applications

gemini-3.1-pro-preview.name: Gemini 3.1 Pro
gemini-3.1-pro-preview.description: Advanced intelligence for complex problem-solving and agentic capabilities.
gemini-3.1-pro-preview.bestUseCase: Complex reasoning, research tasks, sophisticated coding, agentic workflows

gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview.name: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite
gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview.description: Cost-efficient model with fastest performance for high-frequency, lightweight tasks.
gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview.bestUseCase: High-volume simple tasks, cost-sensitive applications, quick responses, lightweight processing

gemini-3-pro-image-preview.name: Gemini 3 Pro Image (Nano Banana Pro)
gemini-3-pro-image-preview.description: Studio-quality 4K visual generation and editing capabilities.
gemini-3-pro-image-preview.bestUseCase: High-quality image generation, professional visual content, 4K imagery, image editing

pricing.note: Preview pricing - check official docs for current rates

gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview.name: Gemini 3.1 Flash Image (Nano Banana 2)
gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview.bestUseCase: Fast image generation, quick visual content creation, efficient image editing

pricing.note: Preview pricing - check official docs for current rates

gemma-4-31b-it.name: Gemma 4 31B
gemma-4-31b-it.description: Gemma 4 dense model with 31 billion parameters. Open weights model for self-hosting.
gemma-4-31b-it.bestUseCase: Self-hosted deployments, fine-tuning, research, on-premise solutions

pricing.note: Open weights - free to use, compute costs apply for API access

gemma-4-26b-a4b-it.name: Gemma 4 26B MoE
gemma-4-26b-a4b-it.description: Gemma 4 Mixture of Experts model with 26B total parameters but only 4B active per inference.
gemma-4-26b-a4b-it.bestUseCase: Efficient self-hosted deployments, resource-constrained environments, cost-effective inference

pricing.note: Open weights - free to use, compute costs apply for API access

computer-use.name: Computer Use
computer-use.description: UI automation and browser task execution capabilities.
computer-use.bestUseCase: Browser automation, UI testing, web scraping, automated workflows

deep-research.name: Deep Research
deep-research.description: Multi-step research capabilities for comprehensive analysis.
deep-research.bestUseCase: In-depth research, comprehensive analysis, multi-source information gathering

deep-research-max.name: Deep Research Max
deep-research-max.bestUseCase: Exhaustive research, academic-grade analysis, maximum depth investigations

embeddings.name: Gemini Embedding 2
embeddings.description: Multimodal embeddings for semantic search and similarity.
embeddings.bestUseCase: Semantic search, RAG applications, similarity matching, vector databases

imagen.name: Imagen 4
imagen.bestUseCase: Image generation, visual content creation, marketing assets

veo-3.1.name: Veo 3.1
veo-3.1.bestUseCase: Video generation, cinematic content, marketing videos

notes.sdkMigration: Use @google/genai SDK. The old @google/generative-ai SDK is deprecated.
notes.freeTier: All models offer free tier usage with limited features.
notes.batchDiscount: Batch API provides 50% cost reduction on all models.
notes.previewModels: Preview models require 2-week deprecation notice before removal.
